summary: Iteration 18 - Pipeline Features Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified - all new pipeline features working correctly including file upload, contact info, asset uploader, history cards with thumbnails, and CompletedSummary with 3 tabs.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed pipelines. One completed pipeline exists for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pipeline Phase 2 features verified successfully. Backend uses Supabase PostgreSQL. File upload stores to /app/backend/uploads/pipeline/assets/ and serves at /api/uploads/pipeline/assets/. Pipeline creation accepts contact_info and uploaded_assets in request body, stores in result field.

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/upload.notes: Uploads images to assets folder, returns {url, filename, type, size}. Validates image content-type.

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline.notes: Accepts contact_info and uploaded_assets in request body. Stores in result field.

GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/list.notes: Returns pipelines with all fields needed for HistoryCard (id, briefing, status, platforms, steps, created_at)

GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}.notes: Returns steps with data for CompletedSummary tabs (approved_content, image_urls, pedro_publish output)

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}/retry.notes: Retry endpoint exists and rejects non-retryable states with 400

mode_tabs.notes: Manual/Pipeline tabs toggle correctly between views

pipeline_form.notes: All form elements visible and functional

asset_uploader.notes: Upload buttons visible for logo and reference images

contact_info_section.notes: Section expands on click, shows phone/website/email inputs

history_cards.notes: History cards display with thumbnail from lucas_design.image_urls[0], all metadata visible

completed_summary.notes: 3 tabs switch correctly. Copy shows approved text with copy button. Images shows grid of 3 generated images. Schedule shows Pedro's publication plan.

step_cards.notes: All 5 agent steps shown with completion status badges and elapsed times

mocked_apis.notes: Channel integrations are mocked. Pipeline AI agents use real Emergent LLM integration.
